chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-1674 of 2010 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For Katcha Peshi. 3. For hearing of MA 6983/10 05.12.2017. Mr. Pir Bux Bhurgri, Advocate for petitioners. Mr. Muhammad Sajjad Soomro, Advocate for respondent. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, A.A.G. -.-.- We have seen this petition which is not maintainable patently as the petitioners are seeking enforcement of alleged contractual obligations against respondent to execute a registered sale deed of the land allegedly allotted by him in their favour. Respondent in his comments has denied the claim of the petitioners. We are of the view that in the constitutional jurisdiction the relief involving factual controversies or the one seeking direction for enforcement of some contractual obligations cannot be entertained. After being confronted with these facts, the petitioners’ Counsel does not press this petition and submits that he would be availing remedy in accordance with law. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed as not pressed alongwith listed application. The petitioners may avail their remedy, if any, which will be however subject to all just exceptions. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
